REGIONAL CONTRACTING AUTHORITY — AWARD DECISION

Tender ref: RCA-2024-ROAD-014
Subject: Resurfacing of Provincial Road SP-118, Lot 3
Estimated value: EUR 1,180,000 (just below EUR 1,200,000 EU-publication threshold)
Submission deadline: 2024-03-22, 17:00
Bids received: 4

  Bidder 1 — Acme Strade Srl       — bid: EUR 1,176,400.00 — WINNER
  Bidder 2 — Beta Costruzioni Srl  — bid: EUR 1,290,300.00
  Bidder 3 — Gamma Lavori Srl      — bid: EUR 1,294,800.00
  Bidder 4 — Delta Strade Srl      — bid: EUR 1,299,200.00

Prior awards in the same SP-118 programme (2021-2023):
  RCA-2021-ROAD-009 winner: Beta Costruzioni Srl (Acme, Gamma, Delta as runners-up)
  RCA-2022-ROAD-011 winner: Gamma Lavori Srl  (Acme, Beta, Delta as runners-up)
  RCA-2023-ROAD-013 winner: Delta Strade Srl  (Acme, Beta, Gamma as runners-up)
  RCA-2024-ROAD-014 winner: Acme Strade Srl   (Beta, Gamma, Delta as runners-up)

Award signed by:
  R. Bianchi, Procurement Officer
  2024-04-02
